items.title: Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking
items.description: Build innovative solutions to defend against cyber threats, identify vulnerabilities, and promote ethical security practices in the digital landscape.

items.title: Smart Cities and IoT
items.description: Design smart, connected systems that improve urban living through IoT-powered infrastructure, mobility, and resource management.

items.title: Smart Utility Automation
items.description: Automate and optimize the management of utilities such as water, electricity, and gas through intelligent systems and data-driven decision making.

items.title: AR/VR in Education & Research
items.description: Create immersive augmented and virtual reality experiences that transform education, training, and scientific research.

items.title: Governance and Civic Tech
items.description: Build transparent, inclusive, and efficient tools that empower citizens and modernize government services and civic engagement.

items.title: Open Innovation
items.description: Bring your own bold idea to the table. Any domain, any problem — if it creates impact, it belongs here.
